message:
fix(freeze): dup this_val in push_this opcode handler

The push_this opcode was using this_val directly without duping it, while
getGlobal (used for undefined/null coercion) returns a new reference. This
asymmetry caused use-after-free when the pushed value was later freed.

The fix dups this_val before storing, matching the reference counting semantics
of getGlobal. This fixes crashes in lodash's memoization cache (MapCache) when
using _.get and _.has with different path patterns.

Also adds JSValue.dup() calls to other property-setting opcodes:
- put_field
- put_array_el
- array_from
- define_array_el
- define_field
- native Array.push
